name: Lonmin Plc
description: Lonmin Plc was a major British-based producer of platinum group metals (PGMs), primarily operating in the Bushveld Complex of South Africa. The company was involved in the exploration, mining, refining, and marketing of metals including platinum, palladium, rhodium, iridium, ruthenium, and gold. These metals are essential for various industrial applications, most notably in the production of catalytic converters for vehicle emissions control, as well as in jewelry and investment sectors. Following a period of financial difficulty, the company was acquired by Sibanye-Stillwater in 2019, marking the end of its existence as an independent entity.
